description: Phase 2: Planning & implementation for local filesystem repo references. Brainstorming complete; design doc at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-15-local-fs-repos-design.md. Read ./prompt.md for the full handoff, then confirm spec approval with user, invoke superpowers:writing-plans, then execute via TDD.
session_startup: Read ./prompt.md in full before doing anything else
Run git status to verify you are on feat/local-fs-repos-20260414-2235 with the expected uncommitted files
Run ./script/test in background — expect exactly 3 pre-existing schema_parsing failures on inheritance-merge/*/merge.yaml
Confirm with user that the spec is approved (or help them review it)
Once approved, ask for commit permission for spec + fixture + this JSON
Invoke superpowers:writing-plans to produce the implementation plan
Execute via TDD — one failing test at a time per TDD.md

session_notes.baseline_state: 3 pre-existing failures: schema_parsing on inheritance-merge/{alpha,beta,carrot}/merge.yaml; fix via glob tightening in the design doc
